title: Centipede Control New Hyde Park | $350-$550 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional centipede control in New Hyde Park, Long Island. Experienced exterminators serving residential & commercial properties. Same-day service available. Call now!
intro: New Hyde Park residents don't have to share their homes with creepy centipedes any longer. Best Pest Control NYC offers comprehensive centipede elimination services throughout New Hyde Park, from the tree-lined streets near Lakeville Estates to the historic homes around the New Hyde Park Road corridor. Our targeted treatments range from $350 to $550 and provide long-lasting protection against these unsettling multi-legged invaders.
whyUs: With over a decade serving Long Island communities, we understand the unique pest pressures facing New Hyde Park homes, particularly the moisture-loving centipedes that thrive in basement areas and crawl spaces common to the area's older housing stock. Our licensed technicians use family-safe, eco-friendly methods tailored specifically to your property's needs.
localContext: New Hyde Park's mix of vintage Tudor and Colonial homes, along with newer developments near Marcus Avenue, often feature the damp basements and foundation cracks that centipedes exploit for entry and harborage. The area's mature landscaping and proximity to green spaces like Lakeville Playground also creates ideal outdoor centipede habitats that can lead to indoor infestations.

faqs.question: Why are centipedes so common in New Hyde Park homes?
faqs.answer: New Hyde Park's older housing stock often features stone foundations, basement areas, and crawl spaces that retain moisture—ideal conditions for centipedes. The area's lush landscaping and mulched gardens also provide outdoor harborage that leads to indoor invasions, especially during wet seasons.

faqs.question: How quickly can you provide centipede control service in New Hyde Park?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day service to New Hyde Park residents in most cases. Our technicians are familiar with the area and can quickly reach properties throughout the neighborhood, from the Garden City Park border to areas near New Hyde Park Memorial High School.

faqs.question: What does the $350-$550 centipede treatment include?
faqs.answer: Our comprehensive service includes a thorough inspection, interior and exterior treatment focusing on entry points and harborage areas, moisture reduction recommendations, exclusion techniques to seal entry points, and a follow-up visit to ensure complete elimination. Price varies based on property size and infestation severity.

faqs.question: Are your centipede treatments safe for children and pets?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use EPA-approved products specifically selected for their effectiveness against centipedes while remaining safe for your family and pets. Our technicians follow strict application protocols, and treated areas are safe for re-entry within hours, with full instructions provided.
